Package noppes.npcs.api.roles

Interface IRoleTrader

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IRole
    public interface IRoleTrader
extends IRole

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void disableSlot​(int slot)
      prevent an item from being sold on that slot
      void disableSlot​(int slot, IPlayer player)
      disables the slot for this player
      void enableSlot​(int slot)
      allow an item to be sold on that slot
      void enableSlot​(int slot, IPlayer player)
      enables the slot for this player
      int getAvailableStock​(int slot)
      Get available stock for a slot (global mode)
      int getAvailableStock​(int slot, IPlayer player)
      Get available stock for a slot for a specific player (per-player mode)
      IItemStack[] getCurrency​(int slot)  
      long getCurrencyCost​(int slot)
      Get the currency cost for a slot (additive to item costs)
      int getCurrentStock​(int slot)
      Get current stock for a slot (global mode)
      long getCustomResetTime()
      Get custom reset time (only used for MCCUSTOM/RLCUSTOM)
      long getLastResetTime()
      Get the timestamp of the last stock reset
      String getMarket()  
      int getMaxStock​(int slot)
      Get max stock for a slot
      int getPlayerPurchased​(int slot, IPlayer player)
      Get purchased amount for a player in a slot (per-player mode)
      int getPurchaseNum​(int slot)  
      int getPurchaseNum​(int slot, IPlayer player)  
      IItemStack getSellOption​(int slot)  
      int getStockResetType()
      Get the stock reset type
      long getTimeUntilReset()
      Get time remaining until next stock reset
      boolean hasCurrencyCost​(int slot)  
      boolean isPerPlayerStock()  
      boolean isSlotEnabled​(int slot)  
      boolean isSlotEnabled​(int slot, IPlayer player)  
      boolean isStockEnabled()  
      void removeSellOption​(int slot)  
      void resetCooldown()
      Reset the cooldown timer without resetting stock values Stock will reset on next trigger after this is called
      void resetPurchaseNum()
      Sets the purchase count of all slots to 0
      void resetPurchaseNum​(int slot)
      sets the purchase num for that slot to 0
      void resetPurchaseNum​(int slot, IPlayer player)
      sets the purchase num for that slot and player to 0
      void resetStock()
      Reset all stock to max values
      void setCurrencyCost​(int slot, long cost)
      Set the currency cost for a slot (additive to item costs)
      void setCurrentStock​(int slot, int amount)
      Set current stock for a slot (global mode only)
      void setCustomResetTime​(long time)
      Set custom reset time
      void setMarket​(String name)  
      void setMaxStock​(int slot, int amount)
      Set max stock for a slot
      void setPerPlayerStock​(boolean perPlayer)
      Set whether stock is per-player or global
      void setPlayerPurchased​(int slot, IPlayer player, int amount)
      Set purchased amount for a player in a slot (per-player mode)
      void setSellOption​(int slot, IItemStack currency, IItemStack sold)  
      void setSellOption​(int slot, IItemStack currency, IItemStack currency2, IItemStack sold)  
      void setStockEnabled​(boolean enabled)
      Enable or disable stock system
      void setStockResetType​(int type)
      Set stock reset type

      • Methods inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.roles.IRole

        getNpc, getType

    • Method Detail

      • setSellOption

        void setSellOption​(int slot,
                   IItemStack currency,
                   IItemStack currency2,
                   IItemStack sold)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        currency - Currency item
        currency2 - Currency item number two
        sold - Item to be sold by this npc

      • setSellOption

        void setSellOption​(int slot,
                   IItemStack currency,
                   IItemStack sold)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        currency - Currency item
        sold - Item to be sold by this npc

      • getSellOption

        IItemStack getSellOption​(int slot)
        Parameters:
        slot -
        Returns:
        The item being sold in this slot.

      • getCurrency

        IItemStack[] getCurrency​(int slot)
        Parameters:
        slot -
        Returns:
        a ScriptItemStack array of size 2 which contains the currency of this trade

      • removeSellOption

        void removeSellOption​(int slot)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17

      • setMarket

        void setMarket​(String name)
        Parameters:
        name - The trader Linked Market name

      • getMarket

        String getMarket()
        Returns:
        Get the currently set Linked Market name

      • getPurchaseNum

        int getPurchaseNum​(int slot)
        Parameters:
        slot -
        Returns:
        the number of times an item has been sold on that slot

      • getPurchaseNum

        int getPurchaseNum​(int slot,
                   IPlayer player)
        Parameters:
        slot -
        player -
        Returns:
        the number of times this player has purchased from this trader

      • resetPurchaseNum

        void resetPurchaseNum()
        Sets the purchase count of all slots to 0

      • resetPurchaseNum

        void resetPurchaseNum​(int slot)
        sets the purchase num for that slot to 0
        Parameters:
        slot -

      • resetPurchaseNum

        void resetPurchaseNum​(int slot,
                      IPlayer player)
        sets the purchase num for that slot and player to 0
        Parameters:
        slot -
        player -

      • isSlotEnabled

        boolean isSlotEnabled​(int slot)
        Parameters:
        slot -
        Returns:
        if this slot is enabled

      • isSlotEnabled

        boolean isSlotEnabled​(int slot,
                      IPlayer player)
        Parameters:
        slot -
        player -
        Returns:
        if this slot is enabled for this player

        prevent an item from being sold on that slot

        allow an item to be sold on that slot

        enables the slot for this player

        player -

      • isStockEnabled

        boolean isStockEnabled()
        Returns:
        Whether stock system is enabled

      • setStockEnabled

        void setStockEnabled​(boolean enabled)
        Enable or disable stock system

      • isPerPlayerStock

        boolean isPerPlayerStock()
        Returns:
        Whether stock is tracked per-player (true) or globally (false)

      • setPerPlayerStock

        void setPerPlayerStock​(boolean perPlayer)
        Set whether stock is per-player or global

      • getStockResetType

        int getStockResetType()
        Get the stock reset type
        Returns:
        0=NONE, 1=MCDAILY, 2=MCWEEKLY, 3=MCCUSTOM, 4=RLDAILY, 5=RLWEEKLY, 6=RLCUSTOM

      • setStockResetType

        void setStockResetType​(int type)
        Set stock reset type
        Parameters:
        type - 0=NONE, 1=MCDAILY, 2=MCWEEKLY, 3=MCCUSTOM, 4=RLDAILY, 5=RLWEEKLY, 6=RLCUSTOM

      • getCustomResetTime

        long getCustomResetTime()
        Get custom reset time (only used for MCCUSTOM/RLCUSTOM)
        Returns:
        Custom time in ticks (MC) or milliseconds (RL)

      • setCustomResetTime

        void setCustomResetTime​(long time)
        Set custom reset time
        Parameters:
        time - Time in ticks (MC) or milliseconds (RL)

      • getMaxStock

        int getMaxStock​(int slot)
        Get max stock for a slot
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        Returns:
        Max stock, -1 = unlimited

      • setMaxStock

        void setMaxStock​(int slot,
                 int amount)
        Set max stock for a slot
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        amount - Max stock, -1 = unlimited

      • getAvailableStock

        int getAvailableStock​(int slot)
        Get available stock for a slot (global mode)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        Returns:
        Available stock, Integer.MAX_VALUE if unlimited

      • getAvailableStock

        int getAvailableStock​(int slot,
                      IPlayer player)
        Get available stock for a slot for a specific player (per-player mode)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        player - The player
        Returns:
        Available stock, Integer.MAX_VALUE if unlimited

      • resetStock

        void resetStock()
        Reset all stock to max values

      • resetCooldown

        void resetCooldown()
        Reset the cooldown timer without resetting stock values Stock will reset on next trigger after this is called

      • getCurrentStock

        int getCurrentStock​(int slot)
        Get current stock for a slot (global mode)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        Returns:
        Current stock, -1 if not initialized

      • setCurrentStock

        void setCurrentStock​(int slot,
                     int amount)
        Set current stock for a slot (global mode only)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        amount - Current stock amount

      • getPlayerPurchased

        int getPlayerPurchased​(int slot,
                       IPlayer player)
        Get purchased amount for a player in a slot (per-player mode)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        player - The player
        Returns:
        Purchased amount (stock available = maxStock - purchasedAmount)

      • setPlayerPurchased

        void setPlayerPurchased​(int slot,
                        IPlayer player,
                        int amount)
        Set purchased amount for a player in a slot (per-player mode)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        player - The player
        amount - Purchased amount

      • getLastResetTime

        long getLastResetTime()
        Get the timestamp of the last stock reset
        Returns:
        Time in ticks (MC) or milliseconds (RL), depending on reset type

      • getTimeUntilReset

        long getTimeUntilReset()
        Get time remaining until next stock reset
        Returns:
        Time remaining in ticks (MC) or milliseconds (RL), -1 if no reset scheduled

      • getCurrencyCost

        long getCurrencyCost​(int slot)
        Get the currency cost for a slot (additive to item costs)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        Returns:
        Currency cost, 0 = no cost

      • setCurrencyCost

        void setCurrencyCost​(int slot,
                     long cost)
        Set the currency cost for a slot (additive to item costs)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        cost - Currency cost, 0 = no cost

      • hasCurrencyCost

        boolean hasCurrencyCost​(int slot)
        Parameters:
        slot - Slot number 0-17
        Returns:
        Whether this slot has a currency cost > 0
